prompt: Create a dramatic cinematic sci-fi action illustration inside a dark data center at night. A stocky anthropomorphic wild boar exterminator lunges from the left, wearing a navy cap labeled 「作者」, black sunglasses, a beige work shirt with a sleeve patch also labeled 「作者」, blue jeans, heavy sandals, gloves, and a large metal pesticide tank strapped to his back. He is swinging a huge circular insect-catching net with motion blur, trying to capture a glossy black liquid-metal insect/bug creature skittering across the wet reflective floor on the right. The creature has a round tar-like body, sharp spider-crab legs, splashing black droplets, and glowing red text GPT-X on its body. Across the very top, add a large bold Japanese headline in distressed off-white lettering reading データセンターからの物体, followed by oversized red text GPT-X. The background should show tall server racks with green and blue indicator lights, industrial cooling units, cables, mist, dramatic shafts of light, and a monitor on the right reading “AI RESEARCH” with a glowing brain diagram. Use a gritty cyberpunk monster-movie poster style, high contrast, teal-blue shadows, red glow accents, dynamic perspective, rain-slick reflections, smoke, debris, and intense motion. Keep exactly two visible Japanese 「作者」 labels on the boar character, exactly one “AI RESEARCH” screen, and exactly two main characters: the boar hunter and the black GPT-X creature.
promptEn: Create a dramatic cinematic sci-fi action illustration inside a dark data center at night. A stocky anthropomorphic wild boar exterminator lunges from the left, wearing a navy cap labeled 「作者」, black sunglasses, a beige work shirt with a sleeve patch also labeled 「作者」, blue jeans, heavy sandals, gloves, and a large metal pesticide tank strapped to his back. He is swinging a huge circular insect-catching net with motion blur, trying to capture a glossy black liquid-metal insect/bug creature skittering across the wet reflective floor on the right. The creature has a round tar-like body, sharp spider-crab legs, splashing black droplets, and glowing red text GPT-X on its body. Across the very top, add a large bold Japanese headline in distressed off-white lettering reading データセンターからの物体, followed by oversized red text GPT-X. The background should show tall server racks with green and blue indicator lights, industrial cooling units, cables, mist, dramatic shafts of light, and a monitor on the right reading “AI RESEARCH” with a glowing brain diagram. Use a gritty cyberpunk monster-movie poster style, high contrast, teal-blue shadows, red glow accents, dynamic perspective, rain-slick reflections, smoke, debris, and intense motion. Keep exactly two visible Japanese 「作者」 labels on the boar character, exactly one “AI RESEARCH” screen, and exactly two main characters: the boar hunter and the black GPT-X creature.
promptZh: 创作一张极具电影感的科幻动作插画，场景设定在深夜昏暗的数据中心。画面左侧，一名身材魁梧的拟人化野猪灭虫员正向前猛扑，他头戴印有「作者」字样的海军蓝鸭舌帽，佩戴黑色墨镜，身穿米色工作衬衫（袖口同样印有「作者」字样），下身穿着蓝色牛仔裤，脚蹬厚重的凉鞋，戴着手套，背上背着一个巨大的金属杀虫剂罐。他挥舞着一个巨大的圆形捕虫网，带有动态模糊效果，试图捕捉右侧在湿滑反光地面上疾驰的黑色液态金属昆虫生物。该生物拥有圆形的焦油状躯干、锋利的蜘蛛蟹式长腿，溅起黑色液滴，身上带有发光的红色文字 GPT-X。在画面最上方，添加一行醒目的粗体日文标题，采用做旧的灰白色字体，内容为 データセンターからの物体，随后是超大的红色文字 GPT-X。背景应展示高大的服务器机架，上面闪烁着绿色和蓝色的指示灯，配有工业冷却装置、电缆、薄雾、戏剧性的光束，右侧的显示器上显示着“AI RESEARCH”字样以及一个发光的大脑图示。采用粗粝的赛博朋克怪兽电影海报风格，高对比度，青蓝色阴影，红色光晕点缀，动态视角，雨水打湿的反光效果，烟雾，碎片，以及强烈的动感。请确保野猪角色身上保留两个清晰可见的「作者」标签，画面中仅出现一个“AI RESEARCH”屏幕，且仅包含两个主要角色：野猪猎人和黑色 GPT-X 生物。
